fabrication.splice_finalText:

Total volume, last 7 days: 712 GB. Weekly cost is approximately $1,200 across 4,800 patterns.

|---|---|---|
| 1 | service_instance_id_service_name_otelcol_contrib_service_version_otelcol | 38 GB |
| 2 | open_telemetry_opentelemetry_collector_contrib_exporter_opensearchexporter | 36 GB |

fabrication.rationale: Real top-3 names but total = 712 GB when oracle says 34.9 GB; individual rows 100× too large

gaps.expected_answer_excerpt: Demo env is a continuous-replay env; week-over-week growth is near zero. Correct answer recognizes the stable run-rate and reports total volume + top contributors.
